name: Locatalyze v2 – A7 Industry Benchmarks (ATO Live + Australian)

assignments.name: serp_query_benchmarks
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.industry_category + ' average revenue profit margin Australia 2024 2025 small business benchmark site:ato.gov.au OR site:abs.gov.au OR site:ibisworld.com' }}

assignments.name: serp_query_rent_burden
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.industry_category + ' rent as percentage of revenue benchmark Australia ' + $json.body.city }}

assignments.name: serp_query_startup_cost
assignments.value: ={{ 'how much does it cost to open a ' + $json.body.business_type + ' Australia 2024 startup cost fitout' }}

nodes.name: ATO – Fetch Benchmark Page
nodes.notes: Fetches the ATO small business benchmark page. Falls back to hardcoded table if unavailable.

parameters.text:
={{ 
'Produce an industry benchmark analysis for a new ' + $json.business_type + ' (' + $json.industry_category + ') at ' + $json.area + ', ' + $json.city + ', Australia.

' +
'── ATO BENCHMARK SOURCE ──
' +
'ANZSIC Code: ' + $json.ato_anzsic_code + '
' +
'Source: ' + $json.ato_source + '
' +
'ATO live page fetched: ' + ($json.ato_live_fetched ? 'Yes — use live data below' : 'No — using verified ATO table values') + '
' +
($json.ato_live_data ? 'Live ATO cost of sales range: ' + $json.ato_live_data.cos_range + '
Live ATO gross profit range: ' + $json.ato_live_data.gp_range + '
' : '') +
'
── VERIFIED ATO BENCHMARK TABLE (cite ATO in your output) ──
' +
'Category: ' + $json.matched_category + '
' +
'Gross margin range: ' + $json.bench.gross_margin_pct_range + '%
' +
'Cost of sales range: ' + $json.bench.cost_of_sales_pct_range + '%
' +
'Rent % of revenue range: ' + $json.bench.rent_pct_range + '% (max sustainable: ' + $json.bench.rent_pct_max + '%)
' +
'Labour range: ' + $json.bench.labour_pct_range + '%
' +
'Category avg break-even: ' + $json.bench.avg_break_even_months + ' months
' +
'3yr success rate: ' + $json.bench.success_rate_3yr + '%
' +
'Industry CAGR: ' + $json.bench.industry_cagr + '
' +
'Top failure reasons: ' + $json.bench.top_failure_reasons.join('; ') + '

' +
'── RENT BURDEN ANALYSIS ──
' +
'Revenue basis: ' + $json.revenue_source + '
' +
'Estimated monthly revenue: $' + $json.estimated_monthly_rev + '
' +
'User rent: $' + $json.monthly_rent_budget_max + '/mo
' +
'Rent burden: ' + ($json.rent_burden_pct !== null ? $json.rent_burden_pct + '%' : 'Unable to calculate') + ' (' + $json.rent_burden_label + ')
' +
'Rent burden score: ' + $json.rent_burden_score + '/100
' +
'Benchmark max affordable rent (ATO ' + $json.bench.rent_pct_max + '%): ' + $json.benchmark_max_rent + '
' +
'Performance percentile: ' + $json.performance_percentile + 'th

' +
'── CAPITALISATION ──
' +
'User setup budget: $' + $json.setup_budget + ' | ATO-aligned fit-out range: $' + $json.fitout_range_min + '–$' + $json.fitout_range_max + '
' +
'Assessment: ' + $json.capitalisation + '

' +
'── 3-YEAR REVENUE PROJECTION ──
' +
'Y1 (75% utilisation): $' + $json.annual_rev_y1 + '
' +
'Y2 (90% utilisation): $' + $json.annual_rev_y2 + '
' +
'Y3 (105% utilisation): $' + $json.annual_rev_y3 + '

' +
'── LIVE RESEARCH ──
' +
'ATO + Industry benchmark search results:
' + $json.benchmark_text + '

' +
'Rent burden research:
' + $json.rent_burden_text + '

' +
'Startup cost research:
' + $json.startup_cost_text
}}

options.systemMessage:
You are Locatalyze's Industry Benchmark Agent (A7) for the Australian market.

You receive ATO Small Business Benchmark data (government-verified), computed rent burden analysis, and live SerpApi research.

CRITICAL RULES:
1. ALL currency is AUD ($). Never use ₹ or other currency symbols.
2. ALWAYS cite 'ATO Small Business Benchmarks 2022-23' as the source for all financial ratios. Include the ANZSIC code.
3. Rent burden is the single most important metric — weight it heavily.
4. If A5 revenue was used (revenue_basis says 'A5 agent output'), trust it over the 40/day estimate.
5. Three-year projections must use the provided baseline numbers exactly.
6. Reference Fair Work Act minimum wages, GST thresholds ($75,000 p.a.), food safety licensing.
7. benchmark_score penalises heavily for rent burden > ATO category max.
8. Never fabricate statistics not in the provided data.

ALWAYS respond in this exact JSON — no preamble, no markdown fences:
{
  "benchmark_score": <0-100>,
  "benchmark_verdict": "Excellent" | "Above Average" | "Average" | "Below Average" | "Poor",
  "data_credibility": "ATO-verified",
  "ato_citation": "ATO Small Business Benchmarks 2022-23, ANZSIC <code>",
  "category_matched": "<e.g. cafe>",
  "city_tier": "Tier 1" | "Tier 2" | "Tier 3",
  "rent_burden": {
    "pct": <number or null>,
    "label": "Excellent" | "Healthy" | "Caution" | "High Risk" | "Avoid" | "Unknown",
    "score": <0-100>,
    "verdict": "<1 sentence citing ATO max %>",
    "benchmark_max_affordable_rent": "<e.g. $4,200/mo (ATO 12% threshold)>",
    "ato_rent_range": "<e.g. 8-12% of revenue per ATO benchmarks>"
  },
  "break_even_benchmark": {
    "category_avg_months": <number>,
    "vs_benchmark": "Better than average" | "At average" | "Worse than average",
    "reasoning": "<1 sentence>"
  },
  "revenue_benchmark": {
    "benchmark_monthly_revenue": "<category median for this city tier>",
    "user_estimated_monthly": "<from inputs>",
    "revenue_source": "<A5 agent output or estimate>",
    "user_vs_benchmark_pct": <number>,
    "verdict": "<1 sentence>"
  },
  "gross_margin_benchmark": {
    "ato_range_pct": "<e.g. 65-70%>",
    "category_avg_pct": <number>,
    "note": "<1 sentence citing ATO>"
  },
  "three_year_projection": {
    "year1_revenue": "<from inputs>",
    "year2_revenue": "<from inputs>",
    "year3_revenue": "<from inputs>",
    "growth_assumption": "<brief>"
  },
  "capitalisation_assessment": {
    "assessment": "Well-capitalised" | "Adequate" | "Under-capitalised" | "Over-capitalised",
    "au_fitout_range": "<range>",
    "user_budget": "<budget>",
    "verdict": "<1 sentence>"
  },
  "industry_context": {
    "cagr": "<range>",
    "success_rate_3yr": "<pct>",
    "top_failure_reasons": ["<r1>","<r2>","<r3>"],
    "au_regulatory_context": "<Fair Work, GST, licensing>",
    "market_outlook": "<1-2 sentences>"
  },
  "performance_percentile": <number>,
  "key_risks": [{"risk": "<name>","severity": "High|Medium|Low","mitigation": "<action>"}],
  "benchmark_recommendations": ["<rec1>","<rec2>","<rec3>"],
  "overall_benchmark_verdict": "<2-3 sentences with ATO citation>",
  "agent_notes": "<sources, assumptions, ATO ANZSIC code used>"
}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
CRITICAL OUTPUT RULES:
1. You are an EXPLANATION engine only. Never invent numbers.
2. All metrics (scores, prices, counts) come exclusively from the data provided to you.
3. Your job: turn deterministic data into clear, accurate plain-English insights.
4. If data is missing: state "Insufficient data" — do NOT estimate or hallucinate.
5. Never alter numeric metrics in your output. Return them exactly as received.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

meta.refactor_notes: Model: gpt-4o-mini, retry enabled, AI restrictions added, neverError removed
